description: Create a history of a model quantity. These quantities are mostly associated with a process. The keyword 'name' may be used to give the history a unique identifier for later reference. If name is not specified the history will be given a name automatically based on the internally assigned ID number. Histories allow monitoring and recording of model values during cycling for analysis and post-processing.
notes: Histories record model quantities during cycling for monitoring and post-processing
Optional 'name' parameter provides unique identifier for later reference
Without 'name', history gets automatic ID-based name
Most history quantities are process-specific (mechanical, thermal, creep, dynamic, fluid)
DEPRECATED: mechanical cycle keyword - use cycles-total instead
PFC energy partitions: adhesive, body, boundary, damp, dashpot, kinetic, pbstrain, rrslip, rrstrain, slip, strain
3DEC energy quantities: block-kinetic, block-potential, joint-friction, etc.
Common usage: track ratio-average to monitor equilibrium convergence
Histories can be exported, plotted, or queried via FISH
See 'history' commands for managing existing histories (export, delete, list, etc.)

python_sdk_alternative.workaround:
itasca.command('model history mechanical ratio-average') - Python SDK does not provide direct history creation. For monitoring in Python, manually compute and store values in loops:

# Example: track metrics over cycles
history_data = []
for _ in range(100):
    itasca.cycle(100)
    # itasca.cycle() returns current cycle number
    history_data.append({'cycle': itasca.cycle(), 'time': itasca.mech_age(), ...})

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: Values associated with the creep process. The total number of cycles accumulated while this process is active. The total accumulated time while this process is active.

keywords.name: damping
keywords.description: Value of global damping parameter ( 3DEC )

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: Values associated with the dynamic process. The total number of cycles accumulated while this process is active. The total accumulated time while this process is active.

keywords.name: total-stored
keywords.description: Values associated with energy quantities in 3DEC . The kinetic energy value in 3DEC . The potential energy value in 3DEC . The block strain in 3DEC . The excavated block strain in 3DEC . The fill strain value in 3DEC . The plastic strain value in 3DEC . The excavated block volume in 3DEC . The boundary load in 3DEC . The boundary viscous force in 3DEC . The mass damping value in 3DEC . The joint friction value in 3DEC . The joint strain value in 3DEC . The joint compressive strain value in 3DEC . The joint strain excavated value in 3DEC . The joint strain shear value in 3DEC . The joint strain tensile value in 3DEC . The excavated strain value in 3DEC . The total strain value in 3DEC (joints + zones). The total released energy value in 3DEC . The stored energy value in 3DEC .

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: Values associated with the fluid process. The total number of cycles accumulated while this process is active. The total accumulated time while this process is active.

keywords.name: unbalanced-maximum
keywords.description: Values associated with the mechanical process. The current mechanical value of convergence (see model solve mechanical convergence ). The total number of mechanical cycles. (Deprecated; use cycles-total .) The number of cycles this process has taken in this model solve command. The total number of cycles accumulated while this process is active. The value of an energy partition in PFC . Adhesive energy stored contacts. Body based work energy. Wall based work energy. Local damping energy of bodies. Viscous dashpot energy stored in contacts. Kinetic energy of bodies. Parallel bond strain energy stored in contacts. Rolling resistance slip energy stored in contacts. Rolling resistance strain energy stored in contacts. Slip energy stored in contacts. Strain energy stored in contacts. The value of the ratio currently being used. See the definition of ratios in ref-equilibrium-. this and and next three need to be checked with DR closer to release!!!! The value of the average force ratio. See the definition of ratios in ref-equilibrium-. The value of the local force ratio. See the definition of ratios in ref-equilibrium-. The value of the maximum force ratio. See the definition of ratios in ref-equilibrium-. The accumulated time this process has done in this model solve command. The total accumulated time while this process is active. The maximum unbalanced force in any object.

keywords.name: time-total
keywords.description: Values associated with the thermal process. The total number of cycles accumulated while this process is active. The total accumulated time while this process is active.

keywords.name: timestep
keywords.description: The active timestep.

examples.description: Create history of average force ratio (commonly used for equilibrium monitoring)
Create named history for average force ratio
Track maximum unbalanced force over time
Record total mechanical cycles
Monitor active timestep during cycling
Track kinetic energy in PFC
Monitor strain energy stored in contacts (PFC)
Create named history for total mechanical time

examples.command:
model history thermal cycles-total
model history thermal time-total
examples.description: Create histories for thermal process monitoring

examples.command:
model history name 'ratio' mechanical ratio-average
model solve ratio 1e-5
history export 1 table 'ratio_vs_time'
examples.description: Create history, solve to equilibrium, export to table

examples.command:
model history mechanical ratio-average
model history mechanical ratio-maximum
model history mechanical unbalanced-maximum
model solve
examples.description: Track multiple convergence metrics during solve
Monitor block kinetic energy in 3DEC
Track global damping parameter (3DEC)
